voice: Direct, operator-focused, no fluff. We fix dispatch problems.

icp.label: Fleet operators stuck with bad dispatch
icp.description: Tow operators, courier companies, and small fleets (5-50 vehicles) losing money to manual dispatch, double-booked drivers, and chaotic communication.
trigger_set: Hiring new dispatch staff — scaling without system
Driver complaints — about pay timing or job availability
Losing drivers to competitors — better tech or faster pay
Revenue leaking — missed jobs, double bookings, downtime
Growth plateau — can't scale without hiring 3 more dispatchers

positioning.core_message: Fair dispatch. Consistent work. Real-time payments. Built for independent operators.

angles.name: Dispatch Intelligence
angles.message: Smart matching. Real-time optimization. Drivers know their next job before the previous one ends.

angles.name: Fair Pay
angles.message: Transparent pricing. Same-day payouts. No hidden algorithm, no favoritism.

angles.name: Operator Control
angles.message: You set rates, you see everything. No black box. Just tools that work.

angles.name: Reliability
angles.message: Uptime matters. We don't go down. Your business doesn't stop.

dispatch_intelligence.focus: How smart matching beats manual dispatch
examples: Match drivers to jobs in 10 seconds

community.focus: Operator network, peer success, best practices
examples: How operators are growing with RIN

facebook.audience: Fleet owners, operators, older demographic, local Ontario community

instagram.audience: Younger drivers, operational teams, growth-minded operators
instagram.content_format: Reels + carousel, real dispatch wins, driver testimonials
